form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of a year. Finished off last campaign fourth of 8 at Canterbury F&M Bm64 April 21 over 1100m, 1.5 len behind Ellipsis with 57kg at $21. When resuming last campaign sixth of 9 at Randwick Kensington 3&4yo Bm64 January 15 2025 over 1100m, soft track; 3.5 len behind Alliri with 58.5kg at $15. Useful type who should go well.
